The Terence Williams Story  ·  From Mississippi to the World
Oakland, Mississippi
Population.
Under 600.
A boy from a town
most people drive through
without stopping.
The Beginning
"I come from a place where nobody expected me to do what I've done. That's exactly why I did it."
— Terence Williams
Mississippi State University  ·  2013
One freshman
seminar class.
iProgram. Professor Rodney Pearson. The door that changed everything.
Self-Taught. Unstoppable.
12
iOS apps published — as an undergraduate — before graduation
Apple Developer Program
Nights & Weekends
Nobility Tech Founded
The Reflector  ·  Front Page  ·  February 2016
He built an app
because he remembered
being lost.
Bully Walk — a campus GPS born from personal frustration. 1.3 million routes served.
May 2016  ·  Apple WWDC
One of 350
in the world.
Selected worldwide from thousands of student applicants. Flown to San Francisco. Apple recognized a builder from a town most people never heard of.
The White House Frontiers Conference  ·  2016
Then came a call
from the
White House.
Nominated by President Barack Obama. A kid from Oakland, Mississippi. On the most powerful stage in the world.
The proof of work
1.3M+
Campus Routes Served
350
WWDC Scholars Worldwide
15+
Universities on GradWay
$0
External Capital Raised — Ever
Mississippi Development Authority  ·  Executive Briefing
He walked into
boardrooms
and commanded them.
Teacher  ·  Speaker  ·  Leader
Every room
listened.
From university lecture halls to innovation conferences — he showed up and showed the way.
MSU Entrepreneurship Week  ·  2nd Place  ·  People's Choice
He didn't just
dream it.
He won it.
$1,250 Prize Money
Innovate MS — $1,000
Crystal Award
The Decade of Building
He climbed.
He shipped.
He led.
Ten years of professional engineering. Rising through the industry. Ultimately reaching the peak — Software Engineering Manager at a company most engineers dream of joining.
Moxy Messenger  ·  15,000+ Users  ·  4.7★
But on the side,
quietly,
he kept building.
Moxy Messenger. Schedule any message, on any platform, at the perfect moment. Bootstrapped. Profitable. And about to change everything.
2024  ·  Thailand
An app bought him
a year of freedom.
At the peak of his corporate career, he stepped away. Spent a year in Thailand. Building. Thinking. Exploring. Returning with the clearest vision of his life — and the hunger to build what comes next.
Coffeeville School District  ·  The Dreamer's Scholarship Fund
He came from
Oakland, MS.
He went back for it.
$1,000 annual scholarship for Coffeeville High School graduates. Because the next Terence Williams is already out there — they just need the door opened.
"You don't have to be from the right place. You just have to build the right thing."
— Terence Williams  ·  Oakland, Mississippi  ·  To the World
Software Engineer  ·  Founder  ·  Creator
From
Mississippi
to the world.
